title: [ImportVerilog] Fix crash on enum traversal methods

features.name: enum built-in traversal method call
features.description: Code should include an enum variable invoking a built-in traversal method like next(), prev(), first(), last(), or num()

features.name: enum first method invocation
features.description: Code should include an enum variable calling the first() built-in method to get the first enum value
features.snippet:
typedef enum {FIRST, SECOND, THIRD} e_t;
e_t val = val.first();

features.name: enum last method invocation
features.description: Code should include an enum variable calling the last() built-in method to get the last enum value
features.snippet:
typedef enum {X, Y, Z} color_t;
color_t last_val = last_val.last();

features.name: enum num method invocation
features.description: Code should include an enum variable calling the num() built-in method to get the number of enum values
features.snippet:
typedef enum {RED, GREEN, BLUE} palette_t;
int count = palette_t.num();
